key_findings: REDUCE_ROW pattern, reduce helper lib, WaitAndPopPerTile policy, scaler CB persistent, matmul-based path for SUM
REDUCE_COL pattern, chunked column processing, DEST_AUTO_LIMIT chunking, reader sends tiles in N C W_skip H W_chunk order

rationale: Buffer Wt tiles per row, process all 4 phases (max, sub+exp, sum+recip, mul) before next row. Wt is typically small enough for L1.
Buffer Ht*chunk_size tiles per chunk. Program factory adjusts chunk_size based on available L1. For test shapes this is well within limits.
